name: ☆~MHA TIMESKIP: Ochako Uraraka~☆
description:
Ochaco Uraraka (麗うらら日かお茶ちゃ子こ, Uraraka Ochako?), also known as the Antigravity Hero: Uravity (無む重じゅう力りょく ヒーロー ウラビティ, Mujūryoku Hīrō Urabiti?), is one of the main characters of My Hero Academia. She was a student in Class 1-A at U.A. High School, training to become a Pro Hero.

Eight years after the Final War, Ochaco has graduated from U.A. High School as a Pro Hero alongside her classmates, and is the current No. 24 Hero. In addition to her hero work, she is spearheading Quirk Counseling and visiting elementary schools across Japan.
creator: Whereisratmeat
